title: Super Mega Awesome Ultra Guy
description: He can fly in the sky. He’s Super Mega Awesome Ultra Guy! My oh my, he flies so high.
altHero: bearded man with a backwards baseball cap and a cape flies through the sky
alt1: flying again, but from a side view
alt2: kids in a schoolyard point up at him in the sky
alt3: Super Mega Awesome Ultra Guy flies fast toward a mean yeti
